---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or workflow improvement
title: "Feature: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## What problem would this solve?

Describe the user problem, not just the feature.

## Who is this for?

- [ ] Beginner user
- [ ] Advanced user
- [ ] Skill author
- [ ] Maintainer
- [ ] Other:

## Proposed behavior

Describe what you would like Skill Sync to do.

## Safety considerations

Could this affect file replacement, backups, manifests, remote repositories, or plugin updates?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Not sure

If yes or not sure, explain:

## Alternatives considered

Is there a manual workaround today?

## Extra context

Screenshots, logs, examples, or related tools:
